ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-13-2007 Continued To Feb-21-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Franchesca Callejo (Counsel for Georgia Bray, Trustee); Randall Schmidt (Counsel for Scott Bray, Petitioner); Georgia Bray (Trustee).

Procedural Note: The matter was passed at 9:00 a.m. due to the absence of Ms. Callejo and subsequently called and heard at 9:14 a.m.

Counsel represented to the Court that a settlement agreement had been reached and presented the application to approve the same ex parte. However, after further discussion concerning notice to Ian Ian Bray with respect to the substance of the hearing, the Court continued the matter to February 21, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to allow counsel sufficient time to notice Ian Bray by telephone and by facsimile. The Court granted counsel's request for an Order Shortening Time and Ms. Callejo is to prepare the Order.

Judicial Office: Stella Pantazis, Judge Pro Tempore; Reporter: David Davenport CSR #1694; Bailiff: Deputy Jimmy Peralta; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnson.
